---
title: "Jane Duke Yonge"
---

## Jane Duke Yonge

**Dates:** (1820/1-27 March 1855)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Third dau of Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch and Alethea Henrietta Bargus. [tomb Newton Ferrars Church]

### Letters

- Letter from March 25th 1867
- Letter from <b>Error! Bookmark not defined</b>.OtterbournMarch 31st [1855]
- Letter from March 29th [1855]
- Letter from Friday [23 March 1855]
- Letter from March 22d [1855]
- Letter from March 19th [1855]
- Letter from Oct 22d [1851[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from [?October ?November 1845]
- Letter from Otterbourn [5 January 1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from 25 September 1838
- Letter from July 4, 1834

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
